purpose: External Tier C coding-agent benchmarks driven by their own harnesses.

suites.operator_command: Run the SWE-bench Lite harness with its OpenAI-compatible client pointed at OmniFusion /v1.
suites.notes: Record OmniFusion commit, harness version, provider models, pricing, cost, wall time, and raw task results.

suites.operator_command: Run the SWE-bench Verified harness with its OpenAI-compatible client pointed at OmniFusion /v1.
suites.notes: Use only for dated provider evidence; do not derive claims from local mocks.

suites.operator_command: Run Terminal-Bench with OmniFusion configured as the OpenAI-compatible model endpoint.
suites.notes: The terminal execution loop remains owned by the benchmark harness, not by OmniFusion.

suites.operator_command: Run the checked-in OpenAI-compatible tool-loop smoke at provider scale and save raw traces.
suites.notes: Use this only for live-provider tool-decision regression and ablation evidence.
